intended_use: The MediAI-BA is designed to view and quantify bone age from 2D Posterior Anterior (PA) view of left-hand radiographs using deep learning techniques to aid in the analysis of bone age assessment of pa
intended_use_full: The MediAI-BA is designed to view and quantify bone age from 2D Posterior Anterior (PA) view of left-hand radiographs using deep learning techniques to aid in the analysis of bone age assessment of patients between 2 to 18 years old for pediatric radiologists. The results should not be relied upon alone by pediatric radiologists to make diagnostic decisions.
ground_truth: Ground truth established by four evaluators using the Greulich and Pyle (GP) atlas method
other_metrics: Deming regression slope: 1.000 (95% CI: 0.989–1.002), intercept: 0.08 (95% CI: −0.004–0.158); Bland-Altman 95% limits of agreement: −0.66 to 0.71 years; mean difference: 0.026 years (SD: 0.3505); 89% of cases within 0.5 years of ground truth
